mapper.sql: id, user_id, identity_type, identity_key, identity_extra, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.update: UPDATE user_auth_identities SET user_id = #{userId}, identity_type = #{identityType}, identity_key = #{identityKey}, identity_extra = #{identityExtra}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
